stemHtml:
What are the three types of aircraft radiotelephony call signs?

(1) The characters corresponding to the registration marking of the aircraft
(2) The telephony designator of the aircraft operating agency, followed by the last four characters of the registration marking of the aircraft and
(3) ...

options.a: The telephony designator of the aircraft operating agency, followed by the flight identification.
options.b: The name of the aircraft manufacturer, followed by the full registration marking of the aircraft.
options.c: The full registration plus the manufacturer's model.
options.d: The aircraft model plus full aircraft registration.
